$meta.usedBy: Feature D2 createPennylaneInvoice — idempotent pre-check by external_reference

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from previous response.next_cursor; omit for the first request.

filter.description: URL-encoded JSON array of filter objects. Supported filterable fields and operators: id / date / customer_id / billing_subscription_id / quote_id (lt/lteq/gt/gteq/eq/not_eq/in/not_in), invoice_number (eq/not_eq/in/not_in), draft (eq boolean), credit_note (eq boolean), external_reference (eq only), category_id (in).

sort.description: Field name, prefix with `-` for descending. Available: id, date.

items.description: Array of Customer Invoices and/or credit notes. Each item includes id (integer), invoice_number, external_reference, currency, currency_amount, currency_amount_before_tax, currency_tax, date, deadline, draft, credit_note, paid, public_file_url, and more.

notes: external_reference supports only `eq` (unlike /customers which allows start_with, not_eq, in, not_in). D2 uses `eq` with the invoice's external_reference (String(display_id)).
